pre_training_command: bash "$PSION_REPO_DIR/scripts/parameter-golf-materialize-public-cache.sh" --contract "$PSION_INPUT_PACKAGE_ROOT/parameter_golf_google_input_contract_v1.json" --target-root "$PSION_INPUT_PACKAGE_ROOT/parameter-golf" && bash "$PSION_REPO_DIR/scripts/check-parameter-golf-single-h100-bringup.sh" --dataset-root "$PSION_INPUT_PACKAGE_ROOT/parameter-golf/data/datasets/fineweb10B_sp1024" --tokenizer-path "$PSION_INPUT_PACKAGE_ROOT/parameter-golf/data/tokenizers/fineweb_1024_bpe.model" --report "$PSION_SCRATCH_DIR/parameter_golf_single_h100_bringup.json" && cargo build --release -p psionic-train --bin parameter_golf_single_h100_train
